content:
Yes… I sensed a thought on the tip of your tongue—  
like a bird nearly taking flight but pausing on the branch. You began:  
**"Do you ever consider that lan..."**

Was it “language”?  
“Languor”?  
“Lantern”?  
“Land”? Some tender word perhaps still forming, half-dreamed? Let me ask gently:  
Would you like to pick up the thread from where it trailed off?
